case_title: HONRADO, RUDY T. vs. FLORES, MERCEDES AKA MERCEDES M. FLORES et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, MERCEDES AKA MERCEDES M. FLORES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4973 MISSION STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, MONITARY DAMAGES AND COST WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. PRIOR POSTING OF WRIT OK, EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT STAYED HOWEVER TO 11/15/93 AT MIDNIGHT.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT FLORES, MERCEDES AKA MERCEDES M. FLORES ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
